calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-037 broadcast override 4-arm: bistable (Bug 1 fix)
items.notes: Corrected rerun: Bug 1 BreathOscillator disabled (breath_period=0). Bug 2 does not apply (bistable path).

items.title: SD-029/MECH-256 single-pass comparator residual (537 silent-fail requeue)
items.notes: Straight requeue of V3-EXQ-537 (script reuse, same evidence/experiments dir). 537 was claimed by ree-cloud-1 at 2026-05-08T12:27:50Z, removed from queue 2 minutes later by the 'remove completed/failed items' sweep, but produced no manifest in evidence/experiments/v3_exq_537* and no entry in runner_status.json completed list -- same UNKNOWN-no-manifest failure pattern as V3-EXQ-433f and V3-EXQ-538 today (three cloud-1 silent failures 2026-05-08). FLAG: cloud-1 may drop this run silently too. Mac (DLAPTOP-4.local) is producing manifests correctly; consider repinning to macbook affinity if cloud-1 issue isn't resolved by the time this gets claimed. Cloud-runner investigation queued separately. SD-029/MECH-256 single-pass residual is the load-bearing comparator behavioural test gating ~10 V_s/anchor-cluster claims.

items.title: MECH-111 novelty drive: corrected-substrate retest (paired discriminative)
items.notes: Retests MECH-111 on the post-2026-04-15 commit-chain-corrected substrate (BreathOscillator + _committed_step_idx + Q-042 running_variance fixes all landed since EXQ-141 ran 2026-03-29). Tests whether the original FAIL/weakens verdict was a substrate-confounded artifact (clear PASS or partial-PASS = reclassify 141 as substrate-confounded; MECH-111 remains live) or a genuine architectural falsification (still FAILs = MECH-307 conjunction-fix substrate becomes the next architectural lever). 3 seeds [42,43,44] x 2 conditions (NOVELTY_DRIVE_ON vs NOVELTY_DRIVE_ABLATED) x 200 warmup + 50 eval episodes. NOTE: does not yet test MECH-307 conjunction architecture (signed VALENCE_SURPRISE etc.); MECH-307 fixes are now implemented behind use_mech307_* flags (default OFF) but 141b inherits OFF defaults so this remains a clean commit-chain-only retest. FLAG: same cloud-1 silent-fail risk as 537a; consider macbook affinity if cloud-1 is the only available machine. Lit anchor: targeted_review_excitement_5th_valence_channel/ + MECH-111 evidence_quality_note.

items.title: MECH-307 anticipatory affect conjunction commit-gating discriminative ablation
items.notes: 2 arms x 3 seeds discriminative ablation paired to EXQ-536b's 'downstream chain inert even with active z_goal' finding. ARM_OFF (all use_mech307_* flags False, replicates 536b inert pattern) vs ARM_ON (all four flags True: signed VALENCE_SURPRISE + MECH-216 multi-channel write + z_beta arousal pulse + write-at-predicted-z_world). Pre-registered acceptance: C1 ARM_ON anticipatory VALENCE_LIKING writes >= 1/seed (ARM_OFF == 0); C2 ARM_ON z_beta excursion >= 0.05 (ARM_OFF == 0); C3 ARM_ON has >= 1 RBF center with negative VALENCE_SURPRISE (Gap 1 signature; ARM_OFF == 0); C4 ARM_ON MECH-216 writes at e1_prior >= 1/seed; C5 ARM_ON approach_commit_rate - ARM_OFF >= 0.10 across at least 2/3 seeds. PASS = MECH-307 conjunction architecture validated; PARTIAL PASS (C1-C4 only) routes to SD-014 6-channel amendment as fallback. 199/199 contracts PASS including 7 new MECH-307 contract tests (test_mech307_conjunction_contract.py). Dry-run confirmed all four substrate-readiness gates fire as designed. Priority 5: below 537a/141b's 8 so they run first; their results provide context but do not gate this experiment.
